title: Magical Pungent Moroccan Eggs Kefta Tagine
description: A traditional Moroccan dish featuring free-range eggs and kefta, made with low-sodium ingredients and a blend of aromatic spices, resulting in a pungent and crumbly texture. This recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a show-off dinner party.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and mix well with your hands until just combined.
Divide the mixture into 6 equal portions and shape each portion into a small oval kefta.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the kefta to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes.
While the kefta is baking, whisk the eggs in a bowl and season with salt and pepper.
Remove the skillet from the oven and pour the whisked eggs over the kefta.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the kefta is cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
